name: Prism: Get Scene Path
description: Build or find the filesystem path for a scene file using Prism folder structure templates.
python_code:
import os
import re
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import resolve_prism_core
from src.utils.prism_config import (
    resolve_cfg, get_departments, resolve_dept_folder,
    get_entity_scenefiles_root, read_pipeline_json
)

APP_EXTS = {
    'blender':      ['.blend'],
    'houdini':      ['.hip', '.hiplc', '.hipnc'],
    'maya':         ['.ma', '.mb'],
    'nuke':         ['.nk', '.nuke'],
    'aftereffects': ['.aep'],
    'after effects':['.aep'],
    'cinema4d':     ['.c4d'],
    '3dsmax':       ['.max'],
    'max':          ['.max'],
    'katana':       ['.katana'],
    'modo':         ['.lxo', '.modo'],
    'usd':          ['.usd', '.usda', '.usdc'],
}
META_SUFFIXES = ('versioninfo.json', 'preview.jpg', 'preview.png', 'preview.jpeg')
SCENE_EXTS = set(e for exts in APP_EXTS.values() for e in exts)

def _is_scene_file(name):
    nl = name.lower()
    if any(nl.endswith(s) for s in META_SUFFIXES):
        return False
    return os.path.splitext(nl)[1] in SCENE_EXTS

def _ver_num(name):
    m = re.search(r'_v(\d+)', name, re.IGNORECASE)
    return int(m.group(1)) if m else -1

def _fmt_version(v, padding):
    if not v or str(v).lower() == 'latest':
        return None
    s = str(v).lstrip('vV')
    try:
        return f'v{int(s):0{padding}d}'
    except ValueError:
        return v

class PrismGetScenePathNode(BaseNode):
    name = 'Prism: Get Scene Path'
    category = 'DCCs'

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__(use_exec=False)
        self.icon_path = 'icons/prism_icon.png'
        self.add_input('core',        'any')
        self.add_input('entity',      'dict')
        self.add_input('department',  'string', widget_type='text', default='')
        self.add_input('task',        'string', widget_type='text', default='')
        self.add_input('application', 'string', widget_type='text', default='')
        self.add_input('version',     'string', widget_type='text', default='latest')
        self.add_output('scene_path', 'string')
        self.add_output('task_path',  'string')
        self.add_output('version',    'string')
        self.add_output('exists',     'bool')

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        core        = resolve_prism_core(inputs)
        entity      = inputs.get('entity') or {}
        dept_input  = (inputs.get('department')  or '').strip()
        task_input  = (inputs.get('task')        or '').strip()
        app_input   = (inputs.get('application') or '').strip().lower()
        ver_input   = (inputs.get('version')     or 'latest').strip()
        defaults    = {'scene_path': '', 'task_path': '', 'version': '', 'exists': False}
        entity_path = entity.get('path', '').strip()
        if not entity_path:
            self.log_error('Entity has no path.')
            return defaults
        cfg_path  = resolve_cfg(core=core, entity=entity)
        data      = read_pipeline_json(cfg_path) if cfg_path else {}
        padding   = int((data.get('globals') or {}).get('versionPadding', 4))
        dept_defs = get_departments(core, cfg_path, entity.get('type', 'shot'))
        dept_abbrev = resolve_dept_folder(dept_input, dept_defs) or dept_input.lower()
        scenes_root = get_entity_scenefiles_root(entity, core, cfg_path)
        if not scenes_root:
            self.log_error(f'No Scenefiles folder in {entity_path}')
            return defaults
        task_dir = os.path.join(scenes_root, dept_abbrev, task_input) if task_input else ''
        if task_dir and not os.path.isdir(task_dir):
            self.log_error(f'Task folder not found: {task_dir}')
            return {'scene_path': '', 'task_path': task_dir, 'version': '', 'exists': False}
        target_ver = _fmt_version(ver_input, padding)
        app_exts   = APP_EXTS.get(app_input, []) if app_input else list(SCENE_EXTS)
        if task_dir and os.path.isdir(task_dir):
            candidates = [
                f for f in os.scandir(task_dir)
                if f.is_file() and _is_scene_file(f.name)
                and os.path.splitext(f.name.lower())[1] in [e.lower() for e in app_exts]
            ]
            if target_ver:
                candidates = [f for f in candidates if f'_{target_ver}' in f.name.lower() or f'_{target_ver.lower()}' in f.name.lower()]
            if candidates:
                best = max(candidates, key=lambda f: _ver_num(f.name))
                resolved_ver = f'v{_ver_num(best.name):0{padding}d}'
                self.log_info(f'Found: {best.path}')
                return {'scene_path': best.path, 'task_path': task_dir, 'version': resolved_ver, 'exists': True}
        etype = entity.get('type', 'shot')
        if target_ver is None:
            target_ver = f'v{1:0{padding}d}'
        ext = app_exts[0] if app_exts and app_input else ('.blend' if app_input == 'blender' else '')
        if etype == 'shot':
            seq  = entity.get('sequence', '')
            shot = entity.get('shot', '')
            filename = f'{seq}-{shot}_{task_input}_{target_ver}{ext}'
        else:
            asset = (entity.get('asset_path') or '').split('/')[-1]
            filename = f'{asset}_{task_input}_{target_ver}{ext}'
        scene_path = os.path.join(task_dir, filename) if task_dir else ''
        self.log_info(f'Constructed (not on disk): {scene_path}')
        return {'scene_path': scene_path, 'task_path': task_dir, 'version': target_ver, 'exists': False}

def register_node():
    return PrismGetScenePathNode
